arts.ttl: AZ v Tottenham, Fenerbahce v Rangers: Europa League last 16, first legs – live
arts.sum: Clockwatch updates from all the 5.45pm GMT kick-offs Live scores | Read today’s Football Daily | And mail Yara A Rangers supporter has died in a road traffic accident in Istanbul before the team’s Europa League last-16 game with Fenerbahce at the Sukru Saracoglu Stadium. The Ibrox club announced the news in a statement on Thursday morning. “We are devastated to have learned of the passing of one of our supporters in a road traffic accident overnight in Istanbul,” it read. “The immediate thoughts of everyone at the club are with their family and friends at this incredibly difficult time. The AZ Alkmaar goalkeeper Rome-Jayden Owusu-Oduro is on the leading edge of modern football. A hyphen in both his first/given name and last/surname! I hope his performance in the match lives up to the hyphen hype. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Every word Ange Postecoglou said on Dejan Kulusevski injury, Romero, Van de Ven and Solanke
arts.sum: Postecoglou will delivered an update on Cristian Romero, Micky van de Ven and Dominic Solanke, who are all back from injury and in training ahead of the game. It’s interesting, I've been in game for 26 years, including as a national coach and one rule we know is don’t have any control over international football.

arts.ttl: Tottenham add new player to Ange Postecoglou's Europa League squad for AZ Alkmaar round of 16 tie
arts.sum: Having progressed through to the knockout phase of the competition, UEFA rules allow clubs to make a maximum of three changes to their playing squad following the completion of the league phase. Other players that feature on Tottenham's B list include Dane Scarlett, Mikey Moore, Damola Ajayi and Luca Williams-Barnett.

arts.ttl: Spurs confirmed team vs AZ Alkmaar - Two changes as Spence and Son return
arts.sum: Vicario, Spence, Gray, Danso, Udogie, Bergvall, Bentancur, Maddison, Johnson, Tel, Son (c). The Spurs boss has got Cristian Romero, Micky van de Ven and Dominic Solanke all back from injury and available for this game even though he lost Dejan Kulusevski to a foot injury which will keep him out until after the international break.

arts.ttl: AZ vs Tottenham: Porro dropped, Spence & Son return LIVE!
arts.sum: AZ Alkmaar forward Troy Parrott has no regrets about his time at Tottenham, but would be more than happy to score against his former club on Thursday. When I look back, I just think about the good times I had growing up there.

arts.ttl: AZ Alkmaar v Tottenham LIVE: Europa League team news and line-ups as Romero and Van de Ven back in squad
arts.sum: The Europa League is Spurs, and embattled boss Ange Postecoglou’s, last chance for a trophy this season

arts.ttl: Tottenham Hotspur's £18m transfer reality a huge boost for Ange Postecoglou's summer plans
arts.sum: Central defender Luka Vuskovic agreed a deal to sign for Spurs back in September 2023, joining the club from the summer of 2025. The Europa League remains the only chance of silverware this season for Postecoglou to win, continuing his trend of winning silverware in his second year at clubs he's managed.

arts.ttl: Paul Merson names four Europa League favourites as 'dangerous' Tottenham verdict given
arts.sum: Paul Merson believes that Tottenham are one of the four favourites to win the Europa League, as Ange Postecoglou's side prepare to take on AZ Alkmaar in the round of 16 first leg. Speaking ahead of Spurs' trip to Alkmaar, Merson told Sky Sports : "If you look at the Europa League, Tottenham, Lyon, Athletic Bilbao and Lazio are the four teams to win it.

arts.ttl: AZ Alkmaar vs Spurs TV channel and Europa League live stream
arts.sum: With TNT sports broadcasting AZ Alkmaar vs Tottenham, that means the game will also be available to live stream on Thursday evening. Yes, TNT Sports have the broadcasting rights for the Europa League in the UK and will be covering the game on Thursday evening.
